Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 30/11/2024
The week in ship recycling saw a consistent lack of movement across the board, with no major surprises or shifts. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Highlights of the week
The week in ship recycling saw a consistent lack of movement across the board, with no major surprises or shifts. India stayed steady at its low levels from
last week.
